understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the current BP35 level by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding spikes and other hazards, and to continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won, within the limited attempts and turn budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn allowed either a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or a CLICK on a specific tile coordinate; after any horizontal move, gravity automatically carried the player in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile, reaching the goal, or dying to a hazard (e.g., spikes). CLICK removed breakable/clickable blocks ('x') to open or alter fall paths without consuming platform timer (when applicable). Landing on spike tiles ('u'/'v') ended the attempt immediately and reset the level for the next attempt. UNDO could revert the previous action to recover from mistakes.
